appDescription.message: Browser extension for CPH-NG: submits solutions automatically from VS Code to competitive programming judges.

elementErrorMessage.message: Can not find the element using the selector "$SELECTOR$"

extractErrorMessage.message: Can not extract the "$KEY$" info from existing data.

interactionRequired.message: Please interact with the page to complete the submission.

internalErrorMessage.message: An internal error occurred. Please try again. If the problem persists, please report it on GitHub.

longTimeSubmission.message: The submission is taking longer than expected. Please wait patiently or try again. If the problem persists, please report it on GitHub.
